untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires visual/geometric detection of twin bottoms (V-shape vs rounded shape), downtrend context, and confirmation line identification. These cannot be expressed using only price and technical indicators. The signal requires: (1) Detection of two distinct bottom formations with different shapes (Adam V-shape vs Eve rounded), (2) Identification of the highest high between bottoms as confirmation line, (3) Verification that no dip below left bottom occurred, (4) Context that pattern forms in downtrend (~4 months). None of these geometric/contextual pattern detection rules can be mechanically constructed from the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band) as a proxy for the confirmation line (highest high), and dc_lower as a reasonable exit. However, this loses the critical pattern geometry logic. A complete implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic outside the scope of technical indicator rules.
